## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the project's code rules (zero hard-coding, no secrets, security first)
- [ ] I have tested on macOS with real microphone input
- [ ] I have tested with the .app bundle (not just `python3 px_dictate_app.py`)
- [ ] My changes don't introduce any new dependencies (or I've explained why)
- [ ] Screenshots included if UI changed (light mode AND dark mode)
